interpretation_note: Positive numerical direction only; p=0.30 and CI includes 0; controls match or exceed this delta; no robust incremental predictive utility relative to the prespecified kinematic+safety baseline was demonstrated.
LOSO delta Spearman is approximately zero, MAE reduction is negative, and CV-R2 delta is negative; generalization is not established.
LOFO direction is nonsignificant and boundary-only; it does not establish robustness or IPV-specific utility.
S1 uses the same 53 cells as primary, so agreement is not an independent safe-subset robustness check.
S2 uses the same 53 cells as primary, so agreement is not an independent safe-subset robustness check.
S3 has only 6 cells and null/reverse behavior; it provides no safe-subset robustness support.
Fallback sensitivity reverses on Spearman and is not confirmatory.
